attendance_warning_body:
Dear Parent,

{{name}}'s attendance has dropped to {{percentage}}%, which is below the required 75%.

Please contact the class teacher immediately to discuss and take corrective action.

Regards,
Attendance Monitoring System
fee_reminder_body:
Dear Parent,

This is a gentle reminder that a fee balance of ₹{{balance}} for {{name}} is due in {{days}} day(s).
Due Date: {{dueDate}}

Please make the payment at the earliest to avoid any inconvenience.

Regards,
Fee Management System
absent_today_body:
Dear Parent,

{{name}} was marked ABSENT today ({{date}}).

If this is an error, please contact the school administration.

Regards,
Attendance Monitoring System
